subject: Cannot upload files to tasks
message:
Hello TechCorp Support Team,

I'm having trouble uploading files to my tasks. Every time I try to drag and drop a PDF file (about 25MB), I get an error message saying 'File upload failed'. I've tried multiple files and different browsers, but the issue persists. This is blocking our team's ability to share important documents with clients.

Could you please help me resolve this issue urgently? We're on the Pro plan and need this functionality working properly.

Thanks,
John Smith
notes: Check file size limits, browser compatibility, and network connectivity. Suggest alternative upload methods if drag-and-drop fails.

subject: How to create recurring tasks
message: How do I set up a task that repeats every week?
notes: Explain how to access task settings and configure recurrence with weekly frequency.

subject: Question about API rate limits
message: We're considering upgrading to the Pro plan for API access. Could you clarify what the rate limits are and how they work? We expect to make about 800 API calls per hour for our integration. Also, do you provide SDKs for Python and JavaScript?
notes: Explain Pro plan rate limits (1000 requests/hour), confirm their usage is within limits, and mention available SDKs.

subject: Request for refund - overcharged
message:
Dear TechCorp,

I need to request a refund for this month's billing. We were charged $99 for the Pro plan but we downgraded to Starter plan last week and should have been charged $29. I've tried contacting billing multiple times but haven't received a response.

This is unacceptable customer service. If this isn't resolved immediately, I'll be filing a chargeback with my credit card company.

Please process a $70 refund to my card immediately.

Regards,
Lisa Anderson
notes: Customer is angry and threatening chargeback. Escalate to billing team immediately for refund processing.

subject: Login not working
message: Can't log in. Says wrong password but I'm sure it's correct.
notes: Guide through password reset process and suggest checking for typos or caps lock.

subject: Slack integration notifications not working
message: We connected TechCorp to our Slack workspace last week, but we're not receiving any notifications when tasks are assigned or updated. I've double-checked the channel permissions and everything looks correct. Is there something we're missing in the setup?
notes: Troubleshoot Slack integration setup, check webhook permissions, and suggest reconnection steps.

subject: Feature request: Gantt chart improvements
message:
Hi TechCorp Team,

We've been using your platform for 6 months and love it! However, we'd love to see some improvements to the Gantt chart functionality:

1. Critical path highlighting
2. Milestone markers with dates
3. Export to PDF functionality
4. Resource allocation view

These features would make project planning much more efficient for our construction projects.

Keep up the great work!

Tom Wilson
notes: Acknowledge feature request, thank customer for feedback, and provide timeline for feature consideration.

subject: human
message: human
notes: Customer requested human agent directly on WhatsApp. Escalate immediately.

subject: SSO setup for Enterprise plan
message: We're on the Enterprise plan and need to set up SSO with our Okta identity provider. I've contacted sales@techcorp.io twice but haven't heard back. Our security team requires SSO implementation by end of week. Can you help expedite this process?
notes: Enterprise customer with urgent SSO requirement. Escalate to sales/engineering team.

subject: Tasks not syncing between web and mobile
message:
Hello Support Team,

I'm experiencing a sync issue between the web app and mobile app. When I create a task on my phone, it doesn't appear on the desktop version for several hours. Similarly, updates made on desktop don't show up on mobile right away.

This is causing confusion in our team as we're not sure which version has the latest information. We rely heavily on mobile access for field work.

Could you please investigate this sync delay issue?

Best regards,
Jennifer Davis
notes: Provide troubleshooting steps for sync issues, including force refresh and checking network connectivity.

subject: How to add subtasks
message: How do I add subtasks to an existing task?
notes: Explain how to open task details and add subtasks using the '+ Add Subtask' button.

subject: Data privacy request - GDPR
message:
Under GDPR, I request the complete deletion of all my personal data from your systems. This includes my account information, project data, and any other personal information you have stored. Please confirm once this deletion is complete and provide a certificate of deletion.

You have 30 days to comply with this request.
notes: GDPR data deletion request. Escalate to legal/data privacy team immediately.

subject: Cannot invite team members
message:
Hi Support,

I'm trying to invite new team members to our workspace, but the invitations are not being sent. I enter the email addresses, select their roles, and click 'Send Invitations', but no one receives the invitation emails. I've checked the spam folders and tried multiple email addresses.

We're on the Pro plan and should be able to add up to 25 users. Currently, we only have 8 users.

Can you help resolve this invitation issue?

Thanks,
Robert
notes: Check email delivery issues, verify domain reputation, and suggest alternative invitation methods.

subject: Billing question
message: When does our subscription renew?
notes: Guide customer to check billing settings for renewal date and plan details.

subject: API webhook not firing
message: I've set up a webhook to receive task creation events, but it's not being triggered when new tasks are created. I've verified the endpoint is working correctly using Postman, and I've double-checked the webhook configuration in TechCorp. The webhook URL is HTTPS and returns a 200 status code. Any ideas what could be wrong?
notes: Troubleshoot webhook setup, check event subscriptions, and verify webhook authentication.

subject: Cancel my account immediately
message:
To whom it may concern,

I demand to cancel my account immediately and receive a full refund for the remaining months. Your service has been unreliable for the past month with constant downtime, and we've lost business because of it.

If you don't process this cancellation and refund within 24 hours, I will be contacting my lawyer and filing a complaint with the Better Business Bureau.

This is unacceptable service for a paying customer.

Susan Miller
notes: Angry customer threatening legal action. Escalate to billing team and management immediately.

subject: Project templates
message: Do you have project templates we can use?
notes: Explain available project templates and how to use them when creating new projects.

subject: Discount for nonprofit organization
message: We're a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization and would like to inquire about discounts for charitable organizations. We have 15 team members and are currently on the Pro plan. Is there any special pricing available for nonprofits?
notes: Pricing negotiation request. Escalate to sales team for nonprofit discount consideration.

subject: Google Drive integration not working
message:
Hello TechCorp Support,

Our Google Drive integration stopped working yesterday. When we try to attach files from Drive, we get an error saying 'Authorization required'. I've tried disconnecting and reconnecting the integration, but the issue persists.

Our team heavily relies on Google Drive for document storage, so this is significantly impacting our workflow.

Could you please help resolve this integration issue urgently?

Best,
Daniel Thompson
notes: Troubleshoot Google Drive OAuth issues and provide steps for reauthorization.

subject: Task dependencies
message: How do I make one task depend on another?
notes: Explain how to set task dependencies using right-click menu and dependency types.

subject: Mobile app crashes on iOS
message: The TechCorp mobile app crashes every time I try to open a project on my iPhone 12 running iOS 15. This started happening after the latest app update. I've tried reinstalling the app but the issue persists. The web version works fine, but I need mobile access for field work.
notes: Gather device details, app version, and escalate to mobile development team if needed.

subject: Cannot transfer workspace ownership
message:
Hi Support Team,

I'm trying to transfer ownership of our workspace to a colleague as I'm leaving the company. However, when I go to Settings → Workspace → Transfer Ownership, I get an error message saying 'Insufficient permissions'.

I am currently the workspace owner and should be able to transfer ownership. This is urgent as my last day is tomorrow.

Can you please help resolve this issue quickly?

Thanks,
Amanda
notes: Check workspace permissions and provide alternative methods for ownership transfer.

subject: Storage limits
message: How much storage do we get on Pro plan?
notes: Inform customer about 100GB storage limit on Pro plan and how to check current usage.

subject: Zapier integration setup
message: I'm trying to set up a Zapier automation to create tasks from new Gmail emails, but I can't find TechCorp in the Zapier app directory. Has the integration been removed? We really need this automation for our workflow.
notes: Confirm Zapier integration availability and provide search instructions for TechCorp in Zapier.

subject: This is ridiculous - service down again
message:
Your service is down AGAIN! This is the third time this month. We're losing money every minute your platform is unavailable. I want a refund for this month and we're switching to a competitor.

This is completely unacceptable for a paid service. Your status page shows 'All systems operational' but clearly that's not true.

Fix this immediately or we're gone.

George King
notes: Angry customer reporting service issues. Escalate to technical team and offer compensation.

subject: How to change task priority
message: How do I change a task's priority level?
notes: Explain how to edit task and change priority from Low/Medium/High/Critical.

subject: API authentication issues
message: I'm having trouble authenticating with the API using the API key I generated. I'm getting a 401 Unauthorized response even though I'm including the key in the Authorization header as 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'. I've double-checked the key and regenerated it multiple times. Any suggestions?
notes: Verify API key format and authentication method. Check if key is properly activated.

subject: Cannot remove former employee
message:
Dear Support,

I'm trying to remove a former employee from our workspace, but I get an error saying 'Cannot remove user with assigned tasks'. The employee has several tasks assigned to them, but I need to remove their access immediately.

How can I reassign their tasks and remove their account access?

Thank you,
Helen Scott
notes: Explain how to reassign tasks before removing user and provide step-by-step instructions.

subject: agent
message: agent
notes: Customer requested agent directly on WhatsApp. Escalate immediately.

subject: Question about annual billing discount
message: We're currently on the monthly Pro plan ($99/month). I saw that annual plans get 2 months free. If we switch to annual billing now, will the discount be prorated for the current month, or does it apply starting from the next billing cycle?
notes: Explain how annual billing discounts work and when they take effect.

subject: Dashboard loading very slowly
message:
Hi Support,

Our main dashboard is taking 30+ seconds to load, which is significantly slower than usual. This started happening yesterday. Other pages seem to load normally, but the dashboard with our project overview is extremely slow.

We have about 50 projects and 200 tasks total. Is this normal performance, or is there an issue we should be aware of?

Thanks,
Frank Hall
notes: Investigate performance issues and suggest dashboard optimization techniques.

subject: How to invite team members
message: What's the process for adding new team members?
notes: Explain team invitation process through Settings → Team → Invite Members.

subject: Security breach report
message:
I believe our account may have been compromised. I'm seeing login attempts from locations we've never used before, and someone created projects we didn't authorize. We need immediate help securing our account and investigating this security incident.

This is urgent as we handle sensitive client data.
notes: Security breach report. Escalate to security team immediately for account lockdown and investigation.

subject: Cannot export project data
message:
Hello Support,

I'm trying to export our project data for backup purposes, but the export function isn't working. When I click 'Export to CSV', I get a spinning loader that never completes. I've tried multiple projects and browsers.

We need this data for our monthly reporting. Can you help?

Best regards,
Joyce Wright
notes: Troubleshoot export functionality and suggest alternative export methods.

subject: Project views
message: What's the difference between Kanban and List views?
notes: Explain the differences between Kanban board view and traditional list view for project management.

subject: GitHub integration commit linking
message: We've connected GitHub to TechCorp but commits aren't linking to tasks automatically. I've tried including task IDs like 'T123' and '#T123' in commit messages, but nothing shows up in the task. Are we using the wrong format?
notes: Clarify the correct format for linking GitHub commits to TechCorp tasks.

subject: I want to cancel and get my money back
message:
Your service is terrible and I want to cancel immediately. I demand a full refund for the remaining 8 months of my annual subscription. If I don't hear back within 24 hours with confirmation of cancellation and refund, I'm contacting my credit card company for a chargeback.

This is the worst customer service I've ever experienced.

Samuel Scott
notes: Customer demanding cancellation and refund, threatening chargeback. Escalate to billing team.

subject: How to add labels
message: How do I add color labels to tasks?
notes: Explain how to add labels to tasks through the Labels section in task details.

subject: Two-factor authentication setup
message: I'm trying to enable 2FA for my account but the QR code won't scan. I'm using Google Authenticator on my iPhone. I've tried restarting both apps and even regenerated the QR code multiple times. Any troubleshooting tips?
notes: Provide troubleshooting steps for QR code scanning issues and alternative 2FA setup methods.

subject: Files disappearing from tasks
message:
Dear Support,

We're experiencing a strange issue where files attached to tasks are randomly disappearing. This has happened 3 times this week with different files. The files show as attached initially, but when we check back later, they're gone.

This is very concerning as we're losing important project documents. Has anyone else reported this issue?

Regards,
Pamela Mitchell
notes: Investigate potential file attachment bugs and check for recent changes in file handling system.

subject: Billing date
message: When am I billed each month?
notes: Guide customer to check billing settings for their specific billing date.

subject: API rate limit headers
message: I'm building an integration with the TechCorp API and need to implement rate limit handling. Are rate limit headers included in API responses? If so, what are the header names and format? I need to track remaining requests to avoid hitting limits.
notes: Provide information about rate limit headers and their format for API integration.

subject: Cannot assign tasks to external collaborators
message:
Hi Support,

We work with freelance contractors and need to assign tasks to them, but they're not showing up in the assignee dropdown. I've tried inviting them as guests but they still don't appear.

How can we assign tasks to people who aren't full team members?

Thanks,
Patrick Evans
notes: Explain external collaborator permissions and how to properly invite and assign tasks to contractors.

subject: help
message: help
notes: Customer requested help directly on WhatsApp. Escalate immediately.

subject: Discount for annual payment
message: We're a small nonprofit with 8 team members on the Starter plan. If we upgrade to Pro and pay annually, can we get a larger discount than the standard 2 months free? We have a very limited budget but need the additional features.
notes: Pricing negotiation request from nonprofit. Escalate to sales team for special consideration.

subject: Timeline view not showing dependencies
message:
Hello TechCorp,

We're using the Timeline view for our construction projects, but task dependencies aren't showing up visually. We can see the dependencies in List view, but in Timeline view, the dependency lines are missing.

Is this expected behavior, or should dependencies be visible in Timeline view?

Best regards,
Louis Edwards
notes: Clarify how dependencies are displayed in Timeline view and provide troubleshooting steps.

subject: How to archive projects
message: How do I archive old projects?
notes: Explain project archiving process and how it differs from deleting projects.

subject: Webhook event types
message: I'm setting up webhooks and need to know what event types are available. The documentation mentions 'task events' but doesn't list the specific event names. Can you provide a complete list of webhook event types we can subscribe to?
notes: Provide comprehensive list of available webhook event types for API integration.

subject: This is unacceptable - data loss
message:
I am absolutely furious. We just discovered that 3 months of project data has been completely lost from your system. Tasks, files, comments - everything gone. This is catastrophic for our business.

If this data isn't restored within 24 hours, we will be filing a lawsuit for damages and contacting every regulatory agency we can think of. This is a data breach of massive proportions.

Fix this NOW or face the consequences.

Deborah Sanchez
notes: Customer reporting major data loss and threatening legal action. Escalate to engineering leadership immediately.

subject: Task due dates
message: Can I set multiple due dates for one task?
notes: Explain that tasks have single due dates but suggest using subtasks for multiple deadlines.

subject: Account access for former client
message: We need to remove a former client's access to our workspace immediately. They still have access to confidential project information. We've already removed them from the team, but they can still log in and view projects. This is a legal and ethical issue for our law firm.
notes: Urgent access control issue for legal firm. Escalate to security team for immediate account lockdown.

subject: Cannot connect to API from Python
message:
Hi Support,

I'm trying to connect to the TechCorp API using Python requests library, but I keep getting SSL certificate errors. I'm using the correct API key and endpoints. Here's my code:

import requests
headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'}
response = requests.get('https://api.techcorp.io/v1/tasks', headers=headers)

The error is: SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED

Any suggestions on how to fix this?
notes: Troubleshoot SSL certificate issues and provide Python API connection examples.

subject: person
message: person
notes: Customer requested person directly on WhatsApp. Escalate immediately.

subject: Offline mode on mobile
message: Does the mobile app work offline? Our teams often work in areas with poor internet connectivity and need to be able to view and update tasks without a connection. If it does work offline, how long does it take to sync when we're back online?
notes: Explain mobile app offline capabilities and sync timing when connection is restored.

subject: Cannot set task dependencies in Timeline view
message:
Hello Support,

We're trying to set up task dependencies in Timeline view, but when we right-click on a task, we don't see the 'Set Dependency' option. This option is available in List view, but not in Timeline view where we really need it.

Are dependencies not supported in Timeline view, or are we doing something wrong?

Thanks,
Nicole Bailey
notes: Explain dependency setup limitations in Timeline view and suggest alternative approaches.

subject: How to duplicate projects
message: Can I copy an existing project?
notes: Explain project duplication functionality and what gets copied vs. what doesn't.

subject: Custom fields for tasks
message: We need to add custom fields to tasks, like 'Client Name', 'Project Code', and 'Budget Amount'. Is this functionality available on the Pro plan? If so, how do we set up custom fields?
notes: Explain custom field availability and setup process for task customization.

subject: I'm taking legal action for data breach
message:
To whom it may concern,

Your company has experienced a data breach that has exposed our confidential client information. We have evidence that our data was accessed by unauthorized parties.

We are retaining legal counsel and will be filing a lawsuit for damages, negligence, and breach of contract. We will also be reporting this to relevant data protection authorities.

Expect to hear from our attorney within 48 hours.

Justin Richardson
General Counsel
notes: Legal threat regarding data breach. Escalate to legal team and executive leadership immediately.

subject: How to add comments
message: Where do I add comments to tasks?
notes: Explain how to add comments to tasks using the comments section in task details.

subject: Enterprise plan phone support
message: We're on the Enterprise plan and need the phone support number for urgent issues. I can't find it anywhere in the documentation. We have a critical issue that needs immediate attention and can't wait for email support.
notes: Provide Enterprise phone support number and explain priority support process.
